description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a sturdy, dark-colored frame that outlines the base, sides, and back. The sofa is equipped with three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all upholstered in a light gray fabric that appears soft and comfortable. The armrests are straight, boxy, and at the same height as the backrest, providing a clean, geometric profile. The legs are integrated into the frame, positioned at the corners, and have a simple, rectangular form that elevates the sofa slightly off the ground. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This piece is well-suited for urban outdoor or indoor environments such as parks, public plazas, or modern communal spaces.
description: A modern, three-seater sofa with a dark, rectangular frame and light gray, smooth cushions. The design is minimalist, with straight armrests and a solid, comfortable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back frame structure and the alignment of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size and attached in a linear arrangement.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a minimalist, unpadded design and a dark frame.
attribute_leg_design: Four rectangular legs integrated into the frame at each corner, with a simple, exposed, dark-colored finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with three segmented, uniform cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
